name: Slow Boat to China Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over rice and let stand for 30 minutes. Do not drain.
2. Add remaining ingredients to the mixture. Beef and onion may be browned together.
3. Steam celery briefly before adding it to the rice.
4. Bake covered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
5. Uncover and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
6-8 servings.
